top_signals.title: ‘There’s room for win-win outcomes’: Largest Solana treasury firm Forward looks to acquire smaller SOL DATs
top_signals.summary: Forward Industries is offering to acquire Solana DAT competitors at a premium as their mNAVs slip along with the declining price of SOL.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Investors at US Retail Brokers Got at Least One IPO Share
top_signals.summary: Customers at some of the largest retail brokerage firms in the US each received at least a single share in SpaceX’s $86.2 billion IPO, underscoring how the offering was designed to give individual investors a sizable role.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
